sections.instruction: Questions 1-7: Complete the form below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 8-10: Choose THREE letters A-H.

questions.content: Which THREE options does the woman want to book?
options: A arts demonstration
B dance show
C museums trip
D bus tour at night

sections.instruction: Questions 11-17: Complete the notes below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer. Questions 18-20: Choose THREE letters A-H.

questions.content: Which THREE ways of raising money for the charity are recommended?

B bread and cake stall
